articles.description: No club has ever been relegated with 43 points at the end of a Premier League season - so have Leeds already done enough to secure survival?
articles.title: Premier League relegation battle: Leeds beat Burnley to heap pressure on others

articles.description: Nottingham Forest midfielder Elliot Anderson tells Kelly Somers about coming out of his shell to become a leader.
articles.title: Elliot Anderson on leading at Nottingham Forest and England

articles.description: As Arsenal travel to Lyon in the Champions League semi-final second leg, BBC Sport assesses the importance of unsung striker Stina Blackstenius.
articles.title: Stina Blackstenius: Arsenal striker quietly making a big noise

articles.description: Manager Roberto de Zerbi urges Tottenham to "silence the voice inside of us" as the club battle to avoid relegation from the Premier League.
articles.title: Tottenham: Roberto de Zerbi wants Spurs to 'silence voice inside of us' in Premier League relegation fight

articles.description: McLaren's Lando Norris becomes the first driver to beat a Mercedes in qualifying this year with sprint pole at the Miami Grand Prix.
articles.title: Miami Grand Prix: Lando Norris on pole for sprint race ahead of Kimi Antonelli

articles.description: Mark Allen and Wu Yize play out the longest frame in Crucible history during the second session of their World Championship semi-final.
articles.title: World Snooker Championship 2026: Wu Yize level with Mark Allen after longest Crucible frame

articles.description: Emma Raducanu has linked up again with Andrew Richardson, who coached her to the US Open title as a teenage qualifier.
articles.title: Emma Raducanu links up with US Open-winning coach Andrew Richardson before return to tour

articles.description: Arsenal have largely been unable to call upon Kai Havertz in a season blighted by injury, so what does the future hold for the Germany forward?
articles.title: Kai Havertz: What does the future hold for Arsenal's Germany forward

articles.description: World Athletics president Sebastian Coe says current rules are "on the right side" when it comes to shoe technology, following Sabastian Sawe's record-breaking time at the London Marathon.
articles.title: London Marathon: Sabastian Sawe record will not mean athletics 'strangle innovation', says Lord Coe

articles.description: Barcelona eye Chelsea's Joao Pedro and Tottenham's Cristian Romero, Aston Villa want Paris St-Germain's Ibrahim Mbaye, Leeds United and Coventry City battle for Lois Openda, plus more.
articles.title: Football gossip: Joao Pedro, Romero, Mbaye, Gordon, Openda, Hackney, Rice, Trafford
